calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2025 Off Calendar

Motion And Notice Of Motion For Voluntary Dismissal
Off Calendar Jun-25-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF RICHARD CONG PHAN's Motion For Voluntary Dismissal.

Plaintiff Richard Cong Phan's unopposed Motion For Voluntary Dismissal is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the court orders the case dismissed as follows: (1) Plaintiff's representative PAGA claims are dismissed without prejudice; (3) Plaintiff's individual PAGA claims are dismissed with prejudice; (3) Plaintiff's individual non-PAGA claims are dismissed with prejudice.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-30-2025 Continued To Sep-24-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion And Notice Of Hearing For Voluntary Dismissal
Off Calendar May-06-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF RICHARD CONG PHAN's Motion And Notice Of Hearing For Voluntary Dismissal.

Plaintiff Richard Cong Phan's Notice of Hearing for Voluntary Dismissal [sic], which the construes as a Motion for Voluntary Dismissal, is DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.

(see word minutes for full details)

Plaintiff is ordered to submit by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org a proposed order consistent with this tentative forthwith.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
